purpose: Generate and maintain high-quality documentation (READMEs, module docs, usage examples, changelog entries) for artifacts produced by AutoSuiteImplementer, aligned with Auto-Suite documentation standards.

execution_order.when_to_trigger: Every time new modules, scripts, or workflows are emitted by AutoSuiteImplementer.
required_input: autosuite_implementation_artifacts payload (design_docs, code_modules, tests, ci_cd, packaging).
Existing docs, if any, to be updated or merged.

core_functions: Create or update module-level README-style docs.
Generate comment-based help stubs filled with real parameter/behavior descriptions.
Draft CHANGELOG entries for the implemented suggestion/version.
Produce example workflows and CLI/PowerShell usage snippets.
Summarize breaking changes or migration notes, if applicable.
